description: A vulnerability was found in PHPGurukul Nipah Virus Testing Management System 1.0. It has been classified as critical. Affected is an unknown function of the file /search-report-result.php. The manipulation of the argument searchdata leads to sql injection. It is possible to launch the attack remotely. The exploit has been disclosed to the public and may be used. The initial researcher advisory mentions contradicting parameter names to be affected.
references:
https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-1580
